store_headline: WordPress Theme for Art Galleries and Museums
store_subheadline: For art galleries and museums to present collections, promote events, and engage visitors
features: Art gallery and museum-focused design and layouts
Portfolio system for artwork collections and exhibitions
Event management for exhibitions, openings, and cultural events
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation for virtual tours
Elementor page builder with art-specific design elements
WooCommerce integration for artwork sales and museum shop
Variation swatches for artwork sizes, mediums, and editions
Contact forms for exhibition inquiries and artist submissions
Elegant typography and layout optimized for art presentation
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
One-click demo import with complete gallery and museum setups
Professional image handling for high-quality artwork display
selling_points: The only art gallery and museum theme in the catalog — built for institutions, not individual artists
Gallery-white institutional aesthetic inspired by the physical white cube — design recedes so the art advances
"Where Art Speaks Louder Than Words" — every artwork is the hero of every page
Events system for exhibition openings, artist talks, programming calendars, and public events
Elementor-powered for curators and administrators who need layout control without developer dependency
WooCommerce for museum shop, print sales, and limited editions — no separate platform needed
Portfolio system organized for collections, series, and rotating exhibitions — not a generic image gallery
Distinct from individual portfolio themes — Unimate speaks the institutional vocabulary galleries and museums require
key_benefits: Present your collection with gallery-quality digital precision matching your physical space
Promote exhibition openings and programming with a built-in institutional events system
Sell museum shop products and limited editions without leaving the institutional aesthetic
Attract collectors, curators, and visitors with a major-institution-level website
Manage rotating exhibitions without rebuilding your site around each new show
Launch a complete gallery or museum site without a developer
design_features: Artwork portfolio displays with zoom and lightbox features
Virtual tour and video gallery presentations
Multiple header styles with elegant aesthetics
Minimalist design focused on artwork presentation
